overview.short: Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption (commonly known as St.
overview.description: Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption (commonly known as St. Mary's Church, Secunderabad) is a minor basilica located in Secunderabad, India. The decree designating it as a basilica was issued on 7 November 2008. The church is located on Sarojini Naidu Road in Secunderabad.

topPlaces.name: Centenary Baptist Church Secunderabad
topPlaces.description: STBC-Centenary Baptist Church Secunderabad is a Baptist Church in the city of Secunderabad, India which was established in 1875 by the American Baptist Foreign Mission Society (ABM) and was later led by the Samavesam of Telugu Baptist Churches (STBC) through the Deccan Association. STBC-Centenary Baptist Church has a current membership of more than 3000.

topPlaces.name: The St. John's (Secunderabad)
topPlaces.description: St. John's Freemasons' Hall & Masonic Temple also known as The St.

topPlaces.name: Secunderabad Clock Tower
topPlaces.description: Secunderabad Clock Tower is a clock tower located in the Secunderabad region of Hyderabad, India. Constructed in 1860 on 10 acres (4.0 ha) of land, the structure was inaugurated on 1 February 1897.

topPlaces.name: Secunderabad
topPlaces.description: Secunderabad (Telugu: [sikənd̪əɾaːbaːd̪(u)]), formerly Ulwul, is a twin city of Hyderabad and one of the six zones of the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation (GHMC) in the Indian state of Telangana. It is the headquarters of the South Central Railway zone.

topPlaces.name: Patny
topPlaces.description: Patny or Patny circle is a commercial shopping hub in Secunderabad, India.

topPlaces.name: Jubilee Bus Station
topPlaces.description: Jubilee Bus Station popularly known as JBS is a bus station located in Secunderabad, Telangana, India. It is one of the two main bus stations for buses leaving Hyderabad city, the other being MGBS. It is owned by the state-run bus transport corporation, TGSRTC. JBS is located about 2 km from Secunderabad Railway Station and 800m distance from JBS Parade Ground Station.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas (SPG) Cathedral, Secunderabad
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas (SPG) Church is one of the oldest churches in the city of Secunderabad, India.

topPlaces.name: Secunderabad East metro station
topPlaces.description: The Secunderabad East metro station is located on the Blue Line of the Hyderabad Metro, in India. It is part of Corridor I of the Hyderabad Metro starting from Raidurg to Nagole.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (1 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption, Secunderabad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Centenary Baptist Church Secunderabad, The St. John's (Secunderabad), Secunderabad Clock Tower, Secunderabad, Patny.
